doc.provenance: macOS-only N64 standalone; was the %EMULATOR_ARES% macos command in system_catalog.btrc and the ARES launcher entry in metadata.btrc. The per-system '--system "Nintendo 64"' argument lives on the n64 binding.
doc.sandbox_macos: macos launches run under sandbox-exec write confinement: these grants (plus the platform baseline) are the only writable paths.
